COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-03-2002 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge McCarthy Clerk: Sue Ellen Smith CSR: Loretta Najera

Plaintiff's Atty: David G. Mendez, Esq.
Plaintiff is present (via Mr. Patel).

No Appearance by Defendant.

Mr. Patel sworn and examined.
Mr. Mendez has the 3 Day Notice marked as Plaintiff's Exhibit 1.

Terms of the Judgment placed on the record (see scanned document).

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-29-2002 Continued To Sep-03-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-03-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 611 for Settlement Conference. Present: Judge Diane Wick; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Brenda Fields. Plaintiff represented by David G Mendez, Esq., and there being no appearance by the defendant, the Court took the matter off the settlement calendar. The request for jury trial is stricken and trial date of September 3,2002 is confirmed.
